Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Civil Proceedings; Compendium Of Non-California Authorities, And Request For Judicial Notice In Support
Off Calendar Jul-28-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. R. CRAIG CLARK OF THE CLARK & MARKHAM, LLP, TEL. NO. (619) 239-1321 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - NOTICE WAS GIVEN TO THE OTHER PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT MACY'S DEPARTMENT STORES, INCORPORATED'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Civil Proceedings IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S INDIVIDUAL CLAIM MUST BE ARBITRATED. PLAINTIFF IS GIVEN LEAVE TO MOVE TO AMEND TO NAME A NAMED PLAINTIFF AND ALLEGE A CLASS OF ARBITRATION OPT OUTS. PLAINTIFF WAS GIVEN LEAVE TO AMEND UNTIL SEPTEMBER 12, 2011. THE CASE IS OTHERWISE STAYED. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO READ AND COMPLY WITH C R C 3.1113 (D) AND (F) AND TO ADVISE THE MOVING PARTY REGARDING THE OUTCOME OF TODAY'S HEARING. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Carol A. Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
